title: 6 ssh Commands for Faster Remote Access
summary: Work on remote machines more efficiently with ssh commands for aliases, one-off checks, key files, custom ports, local forwarding, and jump hosts.
verification_setup: Replace the example hosts, users, key paths, and ports before running the commands.
Use only real hosts and credentials you are allowed to access.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/ssh_commands_for_faster_remote_access.sh with real SSH targets and credentials.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example hosts, users, and ports with reachable SSH targets and valid credentials.
